text.title: Vision Image Classification & Content Moderation Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: VLM is called on every image regardless of managed-API result.
antipattern.fix: Insert managed-API stage; VLM only on managed_confidence < threshold.

antipattern.symptom: Output is a flat boolean unsafe=true.
antipattern.fix: Add low/medium/high tiers; policy actions split by tier.

antipattern.root-cause: Pipeline was built as a stateless function.
antipattern.fix: Persist {image_hash, model, confidence, tier, ts} to an append-only audit table.
